Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows significantly elevated creatinine, suggesting impaired renal function. Liver enzymes (ALT) are mildly elevated, indicating possible hepatic involvement. Lipid profile reveals high LDL and triglycerides with low HDL, increasing cardiovascular risk. Globulin is low, which may warrant further evaluation. Other parameters are within normal limits. Recommend clinical correlation and further assessment of renal, hepatic, and cardiovascular status.
